mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(A.PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS A, mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS B WHERE A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.NTCART_SEQ = B.NTCART_SEQ AND B.SBST_CTG = #{eventBranch}
AND B.SBST_CTG = 'WE'
AND B.SBST_CTG != 'WE'
AND UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(PWNR_SUBJECT)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%' ESCAPE '!'

SELECT A.PWNR_SEQ , A.NTCART_SEQ , A.PWNR_SUBJECT , A.STAT_VAL , TO_CHAR(A.EVENT_START_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVENT_START_DT , TO_CHAR(A.EVENT_END_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVENT_END_DT , A.CRET_DT , B.SBST_CTG FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS A, mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS B WHERE A.STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND A.NTCART_SEQ = B.NTCART_SEQ AND B.SBST_CTG = #{eventBranch}
AND B.SBST_CTG = 'WE'
AND B.SBST_CTG != 'WE'
ORDER BY CRET_DT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS WHERE LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND SBST_CTG = 'J'
AND UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(NTCART_SUBJECT)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%' ESCAPE '!'

SELECT NTCART_SEQ, NTCART_SUBJECT, LIST_VIEW_YN, EVENT_VIEW_YN, IMG_DESC, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR THEN EVENT_START_DT ELSE EVENT_START_DT_SEC END AS EVENT_START_DT, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR THEN EVENT_END_DT ELSE EVENT_END_DT_SEC END AS EVENT_END_DT, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR THEN LIST_IMG ELSE LIST_IMG_SEC END AS LIST_IMG, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR THEN NTCART_SBST ELSE NTCART_SBST_SEC END AS NTCART_SBST, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR THEN NTCART_SBST2 ELSE NTCART_SBST2_SEC END AS NTCART_SBST2, NTCART_WRITER, NTCART_WRITE_DT, NTCART_HIT_CNT, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, SBST_CTG, LINK_TARGET, LINK_URL_ADR, LINK_TARGET_MO, LINK_URL_ADR_MO, EVENT_URL_ADR, PLN_SMALL_TITLE, PLN_CONTENT, START_HOUR, END_HOUR, SNS_SBST, PLN_CONTENT2, EVENT_ORDER, THUMB_IMG_NM, THUMB_IMG_DESC, MOBILE_LIST_IMG_NM, EVENT_ADD1_YN, EVENT_ADD1_SBST, EVENT_ADD2_YN, EVENT_ADD3_YN, VERIFICATION_URL, EVENTJOIN_CD FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND NTCART_SEQ = #{value} AND ((TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR ) OR (TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24') BETWEEN TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT_SEC,'YYYYMMDD') || START_HOUR_SEC AND TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT_SEC,'YYYYMMDD') || END_HOUR_SEC ))

SELECT PWNR_SEQ , NTCART_SEQ , PWNR_SUBJECT , STAT_VAL , TO_CHAR(EVENT_START_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVENT_START_DT , TO_CHAR(EVENT_END_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS EVENT_END_DT , PWNR_SBST , PWNR_HIT_CNT , CRET_ID , AMD_ID , CRET_DT , AMD_DT , DATE_PART('day',EVENT_END_DT-CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) as D_Day FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS
WHERE PWNR_SEQ = #{pwnrSeq}
WHERE PWNR_SEQ = (SELECT MAX(PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq})
AND STAT_VAL = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS WHERE STAT_VAL = 'Y'

SELECT aa.NTCART_SEQ , aa.NTCART_SUBJECT , aa.LIST_VIEW_YN , aa.EVENT_VIEW_YN , aa.LIST_IMG , aa.IMG_DESC , aa.EVENT_START_DT , aa.EVENT_END_DT , aa.START_HOUR , aa.END_HOUR , aa.NTCART_SBST , aa.NTCART_WRITER , aa.NTCART_WRITE_DT , aa.NTCART_HIT_CNT , aa.CRET_ID , aa.AMD_ID , aa.CRET_DT , aa.AMD_DT , aa.SBST_CTG , aa.LINK_TARGET , aa.LINK_URL_ADR , aa.LINK_URL_ADR_MO , aa.LINK_TARGET_MO , aa.EVENT_URL_ADR , aa.PLN_SMALL_TITLE , aa.PLN_CONTENT , aa.SNS_SBST , aa.NTCART_SBST2 , aa.PLN_CONTENT2 , aa.D_DAY , aa.WINNER_YN , aa.ABS_DAY FROM ( SELECT a.NTCART_SEQ, a.NTCART_SUBJECT, a.LIST_VIEW_YN, a.EVENT_VIEW_YN, a.LIST_IMG, a.IMG_DESC, a.EVENT_START_DT, a.EVENT_END_DT, a.START_HOUR, a.END_HOUR, a.NTCART_SBST, a.NTCART_WRITER, a.NTCART_WRITE_DT, a.NTCART_HIT_CNT, a.CRET_ID, a.AMD_ID, a.CRET_DT, a.AMD_DT, a.SBST_CTG, a.LINK_TARGET, a.LINK_URL_ADR, a.LINK_URL_ADR_MO, a.LINK_TARGET_MO, a.EVENT_URL_ADR, a.PLN_SMALL_TITLE, a.PLN_CONTENT, a.SNS_SBST, a.NTCART_SBST2, a.PLN_CONTENT2, DATE_PART('day',a.EVENT_END_DT-CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) as D_Day, (SELECT MAX(PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS WHERE NTCART_SEQ = a.NTCART_SEQ AND STAT_VAL = 'Y') as WINNER_YN, CASE SIGN(DATE_PART('day',a.EVENT_END_DT-CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) WHEN -1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ABS_DAY FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS a WHERE a.LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY ABS_DAY DESC, a.NTCART_WRITE_DT DESC ) aa WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN aa.EVENT_START_DT AND aa.EVENT_END_DT AND aa.SBST_CTG IN ('E','G') AND ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT a.NTCART_SEQ, a.NTCART_SUBJECT, a.LIST_VIEW_YN, a.EVENT_VIEW_YN, a.LIST_IMG, a.IMG_DESC, a.EVENT_START_DT, a.EVENT_END_DT, TO_CHAR(a.EVENT_START_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD')AS COM_EVENT_START_DT, TO_CHAR(a.EVENT_END_DT,'YYYY.MM.DD')AS COM_EVENT_END_DT, a.EVENT_START_DT AS EVENT_START_DT_B, a.EVENT_END_DT AS EVENT_END_DT_B, a.START_HOUR, a.END_HOUR, a.NTCART_SBST, a.NTCART_WRITER, a.NTCART_WRITE_DT, a.NTCART_HIT_CNT, a.CRET_ID, a.AMD_ID, a.CRET_DT, a.AMD_DT, a.SBST_CTG, a.LINK_TARGET, a.LINK_URL_ADR, a.LINK_TARGET_MO, a.LINK_URL_ADR_MO, a.EVENT_URL_ADR, a.PLN_SMALL_TITLE, a.PLN_CONTENT, a.SNS_SBST, a.NTCART_SBST2, a.PLN_CONTENT2, DATE_PART('day',a.EVENT_END_DT-CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) as D_Day, (SELECT MAX(PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS WHERE NTCART_SEQ = a.NTCART_SEQ) as WINNER_YN, CASE SIGN(TRUNC(a.EVENT_END_DT-sysdate)) WHEN -1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ABS_DAY FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS a WHERE a.LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND SBST_CTG = 'J'
AND UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(a.NTCART_SUBJECT)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchValue}) || '%' ESCAPE '!'
ORDER BY D_DAY DESC, a.NTCART_WRITE_DT DESC
SELECT PLN_SEQ, EVENT_BAS_CD, PLN_ODRG, PLN_TITLE, PLN_RMARK, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_PLN_BAS WHERE EVENT_BAS_CD = #{ntcartSeq}

SELECT a.PLN_DTL_SEQ, a.PLN_BAS_SEQ, a.PLN_PROD_ID, a.PLN_ATRIB_VAL_CD_1, a.PLN_ATRIB_VAL_CD_2, a.PLN_SHOW_WRDN_1, a.PLN_SHOW_WRDN_2, a.CRET_ID, a.AMD_ID, a.CRET_DT, a.AMD_DT FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_PLN_DTL a WHERE a.PLN_BAS_SEQ = #{plnSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS SET NTCART_HIT_CNT = CAST(NTCART_HIT_CNT AS FLOAT8) +1 WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq}
UPDATE mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS SET PWNR_HIT_CNT = CAST(PWNR_HIT_CNT AS INT8) +1 WHERE NTCART_SEQ = #{ntcartSeq}
mapper.delete: DELETE mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_PLN_DTL WHERE PLN_BAS_SEQ in (SELECT PLN_SEQ FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_PLN_BAS WHERE EVENT_BAS_CD = #{ntcartSeq})
mapper.select:
SELECT /*eventSql.countByListNmcpEventBoard 이벤트 리스트 count */ COUNT(NTCART_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS WHERE 1=1 AND LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND SBST_CTG = #{sbstCtg} AND EVENT_START_DT <= current_timestamp
AND UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(NTCART_SUBJECT)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{ntcartSbst}) || '%' ESCAPE '!'

SELECT /*eventSql.listNmcpEventBoard 이벤트 리스트 조회 */ (SELECT MAX(PWNR_SEQ) FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_PWNR_BOARD_BAS WHERE NTCART_SEQ = T1.NTCART_SEQ AND STAT_VAL = 'Y') AS WINNER_YN , NTCART_SEQ , NTCART_SUBJECT , EVENT_VIEW_YN , LIST_IMG , IMG_DESC , EVENT_START_DT , EVENT_END_DT , NTCART_HIT_CNT , LINK_TARGET , LINK_URL_ADR , EVENT_URL_ADR FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS T1 WHERE 1=1 AND LIST_VIEW_YN = 'Y' AND SBST_CTG = #{sbstCtg}
AND EVENT_START_DT <= current_timestamp
AND EVENT_END_DT < current_timestamp
AND UPPER(fnHTMLtoTEXT(NTCART_SUBJECT)) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{ntcartSbst}) || '%' ESCAPE '!'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN EVENT_END_DT > current_timestamp AND EVENT_ORDER IS NOT NULL THEN EVENT_ORDER END ASC, EVENT_END_DT DESC, NTCART_SEQ DESC

SELECT NTCART_SEQ, NTCART_SUBJECT, LIST_VIEW_YN, EVENT_VIEW_YN, LIST_IMG, IMG_DESC, EVENT_START_DT, EVENT_END_DT, NTCART_SBST, NTCART_WRITER, NTCART_WRITE_DT, NTCART_HIT_CNT, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, SBST_CTG, LINK_TARGET, LINK_URL_ADR, LINK_TARGET_MO, LINK_URL_ADR_MO, EVENT_URL_ADR, PLN_SMALL_TITLE, PLN_CONTENT, START_HOUR, END_HOUR, SNS_SBST, NTCART_SBST2, PLN_CONTENT2, EVENT_ORDER, THUMB_IMG_NM, THUMB_IMG_DESC, MOBILE_LIST_IMG_NM, EVENT_ADD1_YN, EVENT_ADD1_SBST, EVENT_ADD2_YN, EVENT_ADD3_YN, VERIFICATION_URL FROM mcpeventmng.NMCP_EVENT_BOARD_BAS WHERE EVENT_ADD1_YN = 'Y' AND EVENT_START_DT < current_timestamp AND EVENT_END_DT > current_timestamp
